description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Start a phone trade-in for an unlocked 128GB device in good condition with an estimated payout between $350 and $400, then add it to your cart using whichever payout method shows the highest dollar amount.
tasks.name: Start a phone trade-in for an unlocked 128GB device in good condition with an estimated payout between $350 and $400, then add it to your cart using whichever payout method shows the highest dollar amount.

tasks.instruction: Among 16GB RAM laptops from Dell and HP, compare the highest estimated payout shown for each brand and start a trade-in for the model with the higher payout.
tasks.name: Among 16GB RAM laptops from Dell and HP, compare the highest estimated payout shown for each brand and start a trade-in for the model with the higher payout.

tasks.instruction: Create a trade-in order that includes the two highest-payout phones from Samsung plus any tablet with a screen size of at least 10 inches, and set the order’s payout method to store credit.
tasks.name: Create a trade-in order that includes the two highest-payout phones from Samsung plus any tablet with a screen size of at least 10 inches, and set the order’s payout method to store credit.

tasks.instruction: For the highest-payout 1TB console from Sony, answer the condition questions indicating it powers on, has no physical damage, and includes at least one controller, then generate the quote and lock it for 30 days before continuing to shipping options.
tasks.name: For the highest-payout 1TB console from Sony, answer the condition questions indicating it powers on, has no physical damage, and includes at least one controller, then generate the quote and lock it for 30 days before continuing to shipping options.

tasks.instruction: From an existing trade-in cart, choose partner drop-off, search near ZIP code 94103, select the nearest location within 10 miles, and schedule the earliest available appointment date and time.
tasks.name: From an existing trade-in cart, choose partner drop-off, search near ZIP code 94103, select the nearest location within 10 miles, and schedule the earliest available appointment date and time.

tasks.instruction: During checkout for an existing trade-in cart, choose the mail-in shipping option, select the shipping method with the lowest listed cost, and generate and download the prepaid shipping label for that method.
tasks.name: During checkout for an existing trade-in cart, choose the mail-in shipping option, select the shipping method with the lowest listed cost, and generate and download the prepaid shipping label for that method.

tasks.instruction: Create a new user account on the site and then set bank transfer, with sample bank details, as your default payout preference.
tasks.name: Create a new user account on the site and then set bank transfer, with sample bank details, as your default payout preference.

tasks.instruction: Start a laptop trade-in for a compact Dell ultrabook with a 13-inch display and 256GB storage, mark its overall condition as Fair with a damaged or malfunctioning keyboard, update the offer, and add it to your trade-in cart.
tasks.name: Start a laptop trade-in for a compact Dell ultrabook with a 13-inch display and 256GB storage, mark its overall condition as Fair with a damaged or malfunctioning keyboard, update the offer, and add it to your trade-in cart.

tasks.instruction: During checkout for an existing trade-in cart, apply the promo code BONUS10 and select a lump-sum payout schedule before proceeding to the final review step.
